channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Found an AI Agent That Actually Remembers Everything
item.description: This is a submission for the Hermes Agent Challenge. I have been playing with different AI agents for a while now. Most of them feel like clever chatbots that forget everything the moment the...

item.title: Event-Driven Architectures with Apache Kafka: Powering the Next Generation of Banking Transformation Through Agentic AI and Real-Time Analytics
item.description: It is no secret that in today's fast-moving banking industry, customers require immediate replies, the regulatory environment mandates strict compliance, and there is always an element of...

item.title: Abusing c_variadic in Rust
item.description: What is c_variadic? c_variadic is a recently stabilized feature in Rust that lets you send variadics through C/C++ FFI interop. The best example is with int printf(const char* format, ...): The...

item.title: 인텔이 애플 칩을 제조한다 — 미국 반도체 자립 전략이 만든 거래
item.description: 인텔이 애플의 칩을 만든다, 그런데 진짜 이야기는 '누가 허락했나'이다 트럼프 행정부, 반도체 지형도, 그리고 30년 라이벌의 악수 — 이 거래의 안쪽을 들여다봤다. TL;DR: 인텔이 애플의 칩을 위탁 생산하기로 했다. 표면적으로는 두 기업의 협력이지만, 실제로는 미국 정부의 반도체 자립 전략이 만들어낸 거래다. 오랫동안 경쟁자였던 두 회사가 같은...

item.title: Your AI agent has a master key to everything. Here's why that's a problem.
item.description: I'm a 19-year-old mechanical engineering student. My cofounder is a 19-year-old AI student. Two months ago we started building infrastructure for something nobody had solved yet. Here's the...

item.title: OpenAI Codex vs Google Antigravity: Architecture, Workflow, and Key Differences
item.description: AI coding tools are no longer just autocomplete engines. For the last few years, developers used AI mainly to write faster: generate a function, explain an error, complete boilerplate, or suggest...

item.title: SecAPI: Secure, AI-Driven API Key Management & Leak Prevention
item.description: This is a submission for the GitHub Finish-Up-A-Thon Challenge What I Built SecAPI is a local-first, zero-trust CLI utility and key manager designed to make code security the easiest developer...

item.title: Tauri Sandbox Permissions — Why Your Command Silently Does Nothing
item.description: All tests run on an 8-year-old MacBook Air. All results from shipping 7 Mac apps as a solo developer. No sponsored opinion. The most common Tauri v2 frustration: you write a command, invoke it...

item.title: SQL Pattern Series #1: The Presence Pattern
item.description: Thinking in terms of existence instead of lists SQL Pattern Series #1 of 21 A collection of practical SQL patterns that help developers recognize common solutions to recurring database problems....

item.title: You'll not be replaced by AI if ...
item.description: There are many reasons why one may not be replaced by AI, not even by a possible future ASI. Here's one reason that may just apply to you! ❤️ You'll not be replaced by AI if you can generate...

item.title: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm are all teasing Nvidia’s new N1X laptop processors
item.description: It's the world's worst kept secret that Nvidia is about to announce its own Arm-powered laptop chips at Computex this weekend, and now Microsoft, Nvidia, and Arm are all openly teasing the...

item.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
item.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

item.title: SpaceX gets $4 billion contract to build missile-tracking ‘Golden Dome’ satellites
item.description: The Pentagon awarded SpaceX a $4.16 billion contract to build missile-tracking satellites linked with President Donald Trump's planned "Golden Dome" defense system, as reported earlier by...

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: Another Squid
item.description: Someone named “Squid” seems to be a “West Country legend.” As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the news that I haven’t covered. Blog moderation policy.

item.title: Amazon Is Making an AI-Animated ‘Good Advice Cupcake’ TV Show. Its Original Creator Is Furious
item.description: Loryn Brantz created The Good Advice Cupcake for BuzzFeed years ago. The company licensed the character for a new Amazon series—made with AI—without her consent.

item.title: Hands-On With Gemini Spark: I Gave It Access to My Life and It Friend-Zoned My Boyfriend
item.description: Google’s new AI agent combed through my emails, documents, and calendar to plan a birthday party and still didn’t clock the person most important to me.

item.title: Acer’s launching a Linux handheld for streaming your PC games
item.description: The Acer Nitro Blaze Link might run on Linux, but it's no Steam Deck. Acer says it's a "streaming-first handheld and companion device," like a PlayStation Portal for your PC. Announced ahead of...

item.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
item.description: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.

item.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

item.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
item.description: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.

item.title: ChatGPhish Vulnerability Turns ChatGPT Web Summaries Into a Phishing Surface
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a vulnerability in OpenAI ChatGPT that leverages the artificial intelligence (AI) assistant's implicit trust in Markdown links and images to...

item.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
item.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example...

item.title: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
item.description: This week, an AI training startup called Shift said it would clean New Yorkers' homes for free. It has plans to expand into other cities as well, including London, and looking around my flat, I...

item.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
item.description: Gemini Omni & Gemini 3.5 hero

item.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
item.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted...

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
item.description: High school graduation is a time of change that might be felt more deeply by family members than by the grads themselves. While some grads may immediately embark on a career path, many continue...

item.title: Microsoft delays Fable (again) to avoid GTA VI
item.description: Microsoft has delayed its upcoming Fable reboot once again. The game was set to launch in autumn 2026, but Microsoft now says that Fable will come out in February 2027. However, it will show a...

item.title: We Asked the ‘Future of Truth’ Author to Explain How He Used AI. It Didn’t Go Well
item.description: A book about how AI shapes perceptions of reality came under fire for using AI-generated quotes. Its problems go beyond that.

item.title: Microsoft teases new Surface hardware and ‘a new era of PC’
item.description: I pondered the other day what's next for Microsoft's Surface PC lineup, and it looks like we're about to find out. Windows and Surface chief Pavan Davuluri has just teased "something new is coming...

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.
